title: Birthday Flowers Pop-Up Greeting Card Original Second Nature 3D Pop Up Cards
features: This unique 3D card jumps to life when removed from it's envelope
It is "driven" with an elastic band which "triggers" the Pop Up to instantly open when removed from it's envelope
The card can be easily closed by pinching the finger guides marked on either side
Gift Tag & small side panel available for a hand written personal message
The Pop Ups can be used for so much more, why not use them as part of a table arrangement to hold a balloon, or as part of a floral arrangement?
description: From the manufacturer About us As a company we specialise in unusual greeting cards with innovation and imagination. Second Nature is located in the trendy Notting Hill area of London, England and has been in business for some 30 years.We are a small team of innovative designers with experienced teams operating production and distribution facilities and are committed to producing high quality products. We hope you enjoy sending or receiving these wonderful Pop Ups, a keepsake for years to come!
